penalties.description: Maximum time reached before completion. The ligating loop was not secured on the appendage and the tail was not cut inside the trainer.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: This appears to be a training video or demonstration rather than a timed performance. The frames show repeated instruction prompts and basic loop manipulation without progression toward completion. No secure final state, knot formation, or tail cutting is observed. The video ends with company branding screens, suggesting it is educational material rather than an actual task attempt.
